name: Zucchini with Corn and Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds zucchini, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
1 1/2 cups uncooked corn, cut from 3 ears
1 red or green bell pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a wide frying pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add zucchini, corn, peppers, onion, and garlic to the pan.
3. Cook, stirring frequently, until most of the vegetable liquid has evaporated and vegetables are crisp-tender (about 5 minutes).
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
